rent_value_aed.note: Sum of annualised rent (AED) for the week — contract rent not used.

market_split.note: Off-plan is detected from Select Data Points = Oqood in your sales CSV.

yields.yield_period: Up to last 90 days (or maximum available)

rental.note: Rental metrics use Annualised Rental Price (AED) only. Weekly count/value + new vs renewal (Rent Recurrence) + bed averages.

rental_owner_briefing: Rolling 7 days (Last 7 days (Dubai) — 30 Mar 2026 – 5 Apr 2026, Dubai): 11,612 rental registrations in your CSV, annualised value AED 916.88M. Prior 7 days: 6,418 registrations. New contracts 51.4% of split.

listings.hot_listings_rules: Top 25 asks below average transacted rent per building + bedroom + property type (apartment / villa / townhouse) within the selected area — rental CSV, last 30 days of listings. If a building has too few comparable rentals, the community + bedroom + type average is used instead.

sales_listings.hot_listings_rules: Top 25 asks below average transacted sale price per building + bedroom + property type (apartment / villa / townhouse) within the selected area — sales CSV, last 30 days of listings. If a building has too few comparable sales, the community + bedroom + type average is used instead.
